name: GEX MANAGEMENT, INC.
business: GEX Management is a management consulting and technology business services company providing strategy consulting, enterprise technology consulting, and human capital management services to clients across various industries.

exposures.sentence: In Q1 2023, Mr. Vanamali announced Phase III of GEX Management's strategic roadmap, which involved building out a proprietary AI-powered technology platform and product base to complement its full spectrum of strategy consulting and enterprise consulting business suite offerings.
GEX Management provides cybersecurity services to help businesses protect their information assets.
